title: aster crenifolius var. arcuans
intro: Aster crenifolius var. arcuans, also known as the arcuate aster, is a variant of the aster crenifolius plant that belongs to the daisy family Asteraceae. The medicinal properties of this plant include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes and flavonoids. The health benefits of using arcuate aster include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of arcuate aster can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects.
